description: Introduces intermediate-level communication skills in Central Eurasian languages in varying settings. Students will learn a wide range of vocabulary, grammar structure and pragmatic usage in situated dialogues. They will improve four language skills (listening, speaking, reading and writing) and pragmatic competence through interactive and meaningful in-class activities and after-class assignments.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Central Eurasian Studies Summer Institute

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Central Eurasian Studies Summer Institute
